changelog.en: 1. Optimize the triggering conditions for the highest sensitivity level (triggered when the acceleration exceeds 128mg; less than 128mg requires three interruptions within one second to trigger). \n2. After clearing the "IAS Zone" package, remove the package that reports xyz three-axis data.

wakeInstruction.en: Manual triggering devices. Once the status is synchronized on the Homey App, it indicates that the sleep mode has been exited.
